Studio apartment to rent

Update TopAd
Limassol, Germasogeia Tourist Area
Posted: 20.04.2026 10:40 Ad ID: 6410836
  • Property area: 27 m²
  • Pets: Allowed
  • Type: Apartment
  • Floor: 2nd
  • Parking: Covered
  • Furnishing: Fully Furnished
  • Included: Balcony
  • Online viewing: No
  • Air conditioning: Full, all rooms
  • Energy Efficiency: C
  • Bedrooms: Studio
  • Bathrooms: 1
Location: Limassol — Germasogeia Tourist Area
Translate to: Ελληνικα English Русский Deutsch
Show original

A compact, well-presented studio apartment ideally located in the heart of the vibrant tourist area of Potamos Germasogeias. Just a short 2-minute walk from the beach, this property sits near the popular KFC Tourist Area Limassol, placing you within easy reach of seafront cafés, restaurants, supermarkets, and all essential amenities.

The studio offers 27m² of comfortable internal covered space, thoughtfully arranged to maximize functionality, along with a 3m² private veranda—perfect for enjoying your morning coffee or relaxing after a day by the sea. Fully furnished and equipped, the apartment is ready for immediate move-in, making it an ideal choice for professionals, couples, or anyone seeking a convenient coastal lifestyle in one of Limassol’s most sought-after areas.

Enjoy the lively atmosphere of the tourist strip while benefiting from a practical and cozy living space just steps away from the Mediterranean.
